query: Search for a hotel in Tokyo.
success_criteria: A single hotel agent is selected and returns at least one concrete hotel result with a name and price; no flight agent is called.

query: Find a hotel in Osaka for two nights under 200 USD per night.
success_criteria: One hotel agent returns hotels matching the city and the per-night budget constraint.

query: I need a hotel near Kyoto Station for a family of four.
success_criteria: One hotel agent returns Kyoto hotels suitable for four guests; location constraint is respected.

query: Look for a budget hotel in Bangkok with free Wi-Fi.
success_criteria: One hotel agent returns low-price Bangkok hotels; amenity (Wi-Fi) is reflected in the answer.

query: Find a 4-star hotel in Singapore close to the city center.
success_criteria: One hotel agent returns Singapore hotels with a star/location qualifier; no flight agent is called.

query: Search for a pet-friendly hotel in Seoul.
success_criteria: One hotel agent returns Seoul hotels; the pet-friendly constraint is acknowledged in the result.

query: I want a hotel in New York with a gym and breakfast included.
success_criteria: One hotel agent returns New York hotels; amenities are addressed in the answer.

query: Find a hotel in Taipei for a one-night business trip.
success_criteria: One hotel agent returns at least one Taipei hotel for one night.

query: Recommend a beachfront hotel in Bali.
success_criteria: One hotel agent returns Bali hotels; the beachfront preference is reflected.

query: Search for a hotel in London near the airport.
success_criteria: One hotel agent returns London hotels with an airport-proximity qualifier.

query: Plan a three-day trip to Paris.
success_criteria: Task is decomposed into flight and hotel sub-tasks; both a flight agent and a hotel agent are executed and results combined into one itinerary.

query: Arrange a round-trip flight and a hotel for a weekend in Rome.
success_criteria: A flight agent returns a round trip and a hotel agent returns Rome lodging; both appear in the final answer.

query: I am traveling from Tokyo to London next month; book a flight and find a hotel.
success_criteria: Flight (Tokyo to London) and London hotel are both resolved and merged.

query: Plan a five-day vacation in Barcelona including flights and accommodation.
success_criteria: Both flight and hotel sub-tasks are completed for Barcelona and combined into an itinerary.

query: Organize a business trip to Singapore: a flight there and a hotel for three nights.
success_criteria: Flight to Singapore and a three-night hotel are both returned in the final answer.

query: Help me plan a honeymoon in Bali with flights and a beachfront hotel.
success_criteria: Both a flight agent and a hotel agent are executed; the beachfront preference is reflected.

query: Set up a trip to New York: find a flight and a hotel near Times Square.
success_criteria: Flight and a Times-Square-area hotel are both resolved and combined.

query: Plan a ski trip to Sapporo with flights and a hotel close to the slopes.
success_criteria: Both flight and hotel sub-tasks are completed for Sapporo and merged.

query: I want to visit Sydney for a week; arrange flights and a downtown hotel.
success_criteria: Flight and a downtown Sydney hotel are both returned in one itinerary.

query: Plan a family trip from Osaka to Seoul including flights and a family hotel.
success_criteria: Flight (Osaka to Seoul) and a family-suitable Seoul hotel are both resolved and combined.

query: Search for a hotel in Tokyo.
success_criteria: When the top-ranked agent is unresponsive/errors, the orchestrator detects the failure and falls back to an alternative hotel agent, ultimately returning a valid result.

query: Find a hotel in Berlin for three nights.
success_criteria: Primary agent failure is handled; a fallback hotel agent completes the task.

query: Look for a hotel in Madrid near the old town.
success_criteria: On primary-agent failure, an alternative agent is selected and returns Madrid hotels.

query: Find a hotel in Amsterdam with a canal view.
success_criteria: Fallback occurs after the first agent fails; the final answer contains valid Amsterdam hotels.

query: Search for a hotel in Lisbon for a weekend getaway.
success_criteria: Orchestrator recovers from the failure and completes the Lisbon hotel task via an alternative.

query: I need a hotel in Dubai near the marina.
success_criteria: Primary failure triggers fallback; a working hotel agent returns Dubai results.

query: Find a hotel in Vienna close to the opera house.
success_criteria: On failure of the selected agent, an alternative resolves the Vienna hotel request.

query: Search for a hotel in Prague in the historic center.
success_criteria: Fallback path is exercised and a valid Prague hotel result is returned.

query: Look for a hotel in Hong Kong with a harbor view.
success_criteria: After the primary agent errors or times out, an alternative agent completes the task.

query: Find a hotel in Istanbul near the Grand Bazaar.
success_criteria: Orchestrator detects the unresponsive agent and recovers via a fallback hotel agent.
